overall.description: A ship simulation game depicting a first-person view from a vessel's bridge as it navigates through open water during overcast twilight conditions. The scene features operational navigation displays including a rotating radar, with the ship's bow cutting through calm seas.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge with navigation command center

agents.ego_description: piloting the vessel forward through open water while monitoring the navigation radar and chart displays

entered.detail: Electronic chart display showing coastal map with vessel position and waypoint data
Circular radar screen with rotating sweep arm showing surrounding vessel traffic and terrain
Blue data monitor displaying ship telemetry and system status information
Red-painted bow deck of the vessel with anchor equipment and forward railings
Metal safety railing along the port side of the ship's bow
Metal safety railing along the starboard side of the ship's bow
Calm sea surface extending to the horizon with subtle wave movement

segments.scene_description: A steady first-person view from a ship's bridge showing the vessel moving through open water under overcast twilight skies. Three navigation monitors are visible overhead displaying charts, radar, and ship data, while the bow cuts through the calm sea ahead. The radar sweep rotates continuously as the ship maintains course through the slightly hazy maritime environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as it navigates through a calm, overcast maritime environment at twilight. It begins with a view of the vessel's bow cutting through the open water, framed by the interior of the bridge. As the ship maintains its course, the camera captures the glow of three overhead navigation monitors displaying charts and ship data. The scene remains focused on the horizon, where the rotating sweep of the radar continuously updates against the hazy, dim light of the evening sky.
